name: voice-room
description: Simple link-based WebRTC voice chat with dependency-free Node signaling.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js && node --check scripts/clean-dist.js && node --check scripts/create-electron-config.js && node --check electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build: node scripts/create-electron-config.js && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js --mac --win && node scripts/clean-dist.js
scripts.build:mac: node scripts/create-electron-config.js && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js --mac && node scripts/clean-dist.js
scripts.build:win: node scripts/create-electron-config.js && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js --win && node scripts/clean-dist.js
